title: Skyblock Ultra
description: A modern Skyblock experience for Minecraft 1.21.5 featuring optimized textures, auto configuration loading, improved performance, and full Fabric compatibility.
body:
🪐 Skyblock Ultra

A modern Skyblock experience built for Minecraft 1.21.5 (Fabric)

Skyblock Ultra redefines the traditional Skyblock gameplay with a clean, modern design, improved performance, and full Fabric mod compatibility.
Every feature, texture, and configuration has been optimized for a smooth, stable, and visually enhanced experience — no setup required.

✨ Key Features

🌌 Modern Skyblock foundation with rebalanced mechanics

⚙️ Fully compatible with Fabric 1.21.5 and major performance mods

🎨 Integrated texture pack loading system

🧾 Built-in configuration handling for simple customization

🚀 Optimized startup and load times

🔧 Pre-configured and ready to play instantly (no manual setup needed)

💡 Clean, lightweight structure designed for long-term modpack expansion

🧩 Changelog
🪙 Version 0.1.0 – Genesis

Initial release of Skyblock Ultra

Introduced a modern Skyblock experience with reworked mechanics and smoother gameplay

Built on Minecraft 1.21.5 using Fabric API

Added essential mods: Fabric Loader, Cloth Config, ModMenu

Basic setup screens and structure implemented

⚙️ Version 0.1.1 – System Cleanup

Reorganized source files (client/main separation)

Fixed missing client packages and compiler issues

Updated Gradle + Loom for 1.21.5 support

Removed duplicate resources (modid.mixins.json, icon.png)

Enhanced mod stability and build reliability

🎨 Version 0.1.2 – Texture & Configuration Update

Added automatic texture pack loading on startup

Improved configuration saving and loading system

Optimized resource management and file structure

Fixed broken textures and missing visual assets

Removed SkyCubed (causing crashes) to increase stability

Improved compatibility with Fabric ecosystem mods

🧭 Future Roadmap

🌍 Custom Skyblock progression system

🖥️ Redesigned UI and setup screens

⚡ Further performance improvements

🌐 Optional multiplayer support
